survivors.title: Vintage Timex Girl Scouts Watch Green Rally Strap Date Window -Mechanical- RUNS
survivors.description: Vintage Timex Girl Scouts watch. A wonderful find for both vintage watch enthusiasts and Girl Scouts memorabilia collectors! The watch winds up and runs. It features a white dial with green Arabic numerals and the classic 1970s Girl Scouts trefoil GS logo at center. There is a date window at 3 o’clock and “Water Resistant” marked on the dial. The case sits on the original green rubber rally strap with punched ventilation holes and buckle. The strap is supple with no cracking. Movement is mechanical wind-up. This is the vintage trefoil logo version. Condition is pre-owned vintage with light wear consistent with age. The crystal has minor surface scratches visible in certain light but the watch is overall very presentable. Please review all photos carefully as they are part of the description. Feel free to message with any questions before bidding. All sales final.

survivors.description: This vintage Timex watch comes with a fresh battery just installed and two extra replacement batteries for you. Watch will be sent in a gift box. 🎁 Timex takes a licking and keeps on ticking! 😀🩷 You have to pull the stem out half way to set the date, then advance the clock forward for the day of the week You pull the stem out a bit further to set the time. Be gentle with it. It's old and belonged to my late Father. I bought this for my Dad back in the 80s, he never wore it. He couldn't see the dial but he was in his 70s with poor eyesight. This is a very nice watch. It runs well, all original parts, it's clean. No tarnish. Very minimal wear, just from being placed in a junk drawer and forgotten. The glass has tiny surface finish scratches that are normal for a used watch of this age. The watch says Assembled in the Philippines...the Band says China.

survivors.title: Vintage 1960s TIMEX Mercury Watch Candy Apple Red Dial Manual Works
survivors.description: Vintage 1960s TIMEX Mercury Silver Tone Watch Candy Apple Red Dial Manual 25mm This was one of my watches growing up. I always thought this red face was cool. I wound it and it kept time for about 10 hours. It was off about 7 minutes. These are not perfect time keepers. These early watches featured an electric-powered balance wheel before quartz became standard. I did have to tap and shake it a little to get it going but, it kept ticking after that. The second hand ticked right along too. I changed the date to show “1” and today, it showed, “2” in the date window so that still works. It is missing one of the spring lugs. The width of the space where the lugs go is approximately 12mm. The case has scratches from usual wear. It could use a cleaning. It hasn’t been serviced for decades so the fact that it runs at all is kind of amazing. If you’re handy, you can restore it and slap on a new band or use it for parts. ------------------------------------------------------- It will be well packed as if I were buying it myself. ALL PAYMENTS ARE DUE WITHIN 2 BUSINESS DAYS OF AUCTION END. Please don't make both of us miserable by not paying promptly. You will be sent daily reminders after 2 days, then I'll get eBay involved and no one wants that. I WILL ALWAYS SHIP TO THE ADDRESS REGISTERED WITH PAYPAL. survivors.title: VINTAGE 1989 TIMEX ZeMOMETER - NEW - LIMITED RUN - RARE WATCH ACCESSORY! - READ
survivors.description: VINTAGE 1989 TIMEX ZeMOMETER - NEW - LIMITED RUN - SUPER RARE WATCH ACCESSORY! These are all new and in the original packaging from 1989! I would like to note that these all have various amounts of wear, but I will try to ship out the best conditioned / working pieces first . This listing is just for the packaged ZeMometers (all other photos are just examples and a picture of the stock I have to sell). PLEASE NOTE : A majority (36) of these no longer have the water / liquid inside - Thus, they do NOT function accurately. I spoke with the original creator, and this tended to happen over time. Some of these are more display pieces rather than functioning pieces. How I came about these cool vintage pieces : Recently, I discovered the ZeACCESSORIES that were paired with Timex digitals for a short time from the late 80’s to the early 90’s. These unique accessories were the ZeMOMETER , ZeFINDER , ZeBUG , and ZeRAP. These thermometers, compasses, lip balm/sun screen holders, and adjustable straps could all be paired with Timex watches back in the day. I purchased a case of new old stock from a man by the name of Erik Nordskog , who was one of the original CREATORS of the ZeBUG and other ZeACCESSORIES in the late 80's and 90's ! He detailed his memories and experience developing such unique accessories for Timex Watches. He is an avid surfer, and grew tired of going back to shore to reapply lip balm/sunscreen. Thus, the ZeBUG was born. A small container that latches on to watch bands

survivors.title: 1984 Vintage Timex Men's Watch w/ Speidel Band - PARTIALLY WORKS - NICE - READ!
survivors.description: 1984 Vintage Timex Men's Watch w/ Speidel Band - PARTIALLY WORKS - NICE! This vintage Timex ‘Q’ quartz watch features a sleek, chrome-tone square case that houses a clean, silver dial marked with simple stick indexes and the iconic vintage "Q" logo at the 12 o'clock position. It also has an ultra-cool vertical day-date window at the 6 o'clock position. Paired with the case is a vintage non-original Speidel Watchband. I cleaned it up with the ultrasonic cleaner and it looks nice. The band fits a little loose / large on the wrist. The cosmetic condition of the watch is very nice. The crystal initially had a lot of surface level scratches, but it polished up nicely! There are still some scratches present. The case has imperfections - Notably to the back portion of the watch. The movement itself has/had a ton of battery corrosion. I did my best to clean it up, but corrosion remains. I replaced the battery in December of 2025. The watch seems to function as expected most of the time. If the watch stops, a few pushes and pulls of the crown kick the watch back in to action, but please note that this is not a perfectly functioning movement . The day and date transition accordingly once the clock hits midnight. HOWEVER, the push button under the crown DOES NOT WORK . The day is one off, and cannot be set properly due to the button not functioning. Not sure if this is an easy fix. SELLING THIS AS A PARTIALLY WORKING / POTENTIAL DONOR WATCH. It most likely will need a good service / rep

survivors.title: Vintage 1975 Timex Electric Dynabeat Women's Watch Silver-Tone Grey Oval Dial
survivors.description: This is a vintage 1975 Women's Timex Dynabeat Electric Watch. Dimensions (not including the crown): 22mm W x 35mm H Features: -Grey sunburst dial -Comfortable Milanese Mesh Stainless band with Stainless Steel clasp (fits up to 7¾" wrist) -Acrylic crystal -Sweep second hand (black) -Hacks (pull out the crown to stop second hand in order to set exact time) -Silver-tone baton markers -Chrome-plated oval case with battery door -Correct new #357 battery installed -Tested in 4 positions & working, keeps good time (about 15 seconds/day fast) Beautiful vintage timepiece. No corrosion inside the case, excellent mechanical condition (see last photo). Some minor spotting on dial, hard to see with the naked eye, but it is present (see photo 1). Some very slight wear to the case, and several very small scratches on the crystal. A really nice surviving piece! Powered by the Timex Model 253 Dynabeat, a high-beat electromechanical movement introduced by Timex in the 1970s. It was an innovative hybrid that combined the ticking balance wheel of a traditional mechanical watch with the electromagnetic power of a small battery, instead of a mainspring. 28,800 beats per hour. A gorgeous, affordable, and wearable piece for the collector! Ships well-protected within (1) business day!

survivors.title: Vintage Timex Indiglo Mens Watch 39mm Blue Dial Date 2005 New Battery 7"
survivors.description: Vintage Timex Indiglo Mens Watch 39mm Blue Dial Date 2005 New Battery 7" Brand: Timex Department: Men's wristwatch; sport / casual analog watch with round stainless steel case and bracelet. Model: Timex Indiglo WR 50M men's analog watch with blue dial, date window at 3 o'clock, and stainless steel bracelet. Movement: Quartz analog movement with three-hand time display and quick-set date complication. Case: Approximately 39 mm round stainless steel case with fixed bezel marked at 5-minute intervals, flat clear crystal over the dial, and push-pull crown at 3 o'clock; water resistance rated 50 meters as indicated on the dial and caseback. Caseback: Stainless steel caseback secured to the case and engraved TIMEX, CR2016 CELL, WATER RESISTANT 50 METERS, and additional reference text. Dial: Blue dial with white Arabic numerals at 12, 3, 6, and 9, tapered luminous index markers at remaining hours, printed minute track, and tachymeter scale around the outer chapter ring; printed TIMEX and INDIGLO WR 50M text; silver-tone luminous hour and minute hands with slender central seconds hand. Band: Brushed stainless steel link bracelet with curved outer links and foldover deployant clasp; inside of clasp stamped STAINLESS STEEL along with additional reference text. Features: Sport / casual styling with stainless steel construction, quartz analog timekeeping, Indiglo backlight for low-light visibility, luminous hands and hour markers, framed date display at 3 o'clock, fixed tachymeter bezel,

survivors.title: Timex 47960 03375 Day / Date Automatic 39mm Gold Tone Hombre Dial Wristwatch
survivors.description: Timex 47960 03375 Day / Date Automatic 39mm Gold Tone Hombre Dial Wristwatch. This vintage Timex has a gold tone case measuring approximately 38mm wide x 39mm long x 40mm long lug to lug with 19mm lugs. The case back is stamped "Timex - Self-Wind - Dust Resistant - Water Resistant - Stainless Steel Back - Chr. Pl. Base Metal Bezel". There are spots of wear through on the gold tone coating. This watch has average wear for it's age. The hombre style dial is gold and black with gold/white stick hour markers, gold/white hands, a white sweep second hand, a day and date window at three o'clock, and is marked "Times - Water Resistant - Automatic - 47960 03375". The dial is in good condition. The crystal has surface wear. The inside case is stamped "Case Great Britain Timex". The movement does not have any visible stamps. The crown sets the time/date/day. This is not a quick set crown. The automatic watch is running approximately 2-4 minutes slow per 24+ hours. No guarantee of future performance. This watch does not include a strap. This is a great vintage project piece. ca. 1970's * This item does not include box, papers, booklets, etc. * Due to age there is no guarantee of time accuracy on antique & vintage watches. The watch is running within 1-2 minutes per 24 hours, unless otherwise specified.

survivors.title: Vintage Timex Camper 385 LA Cell Military Style Quartz Mens Watch New Battery
survivors.description: Description Vintage Timex Camper Military Style Quartz Watch Up for sale is a classic vintage Timex Camper / Field style quartz watch. Highly regarded for its minimalist, utilitarian aesthetic and lightweight design, this model is a direct descendant of the disposable military field watches of the late 20th century. This piece features a bold black dial with high-contrast white Arabic numerals, inner orange 24-hour military time markers, a date window at 3 o'clock, and a distinctive orange arrow second hand. It comes on its original integrated black ribbed resin strap. Equipped with a fresh battery, it is ready to wear or add to your vintage field watch collection. Product Details Brand: Timex Gender: Mens Movement: Precision Quartz (Fitted with a fresh new battery) Dial: Black Military 12/24-Hour Layout with Date Window Case & Strap Material: Black Lightweight Resin / Plastic Markings On Case Back: "TIMEX", "385 LA CELL", "WATER RESISTANT", "PHILIPPINES A2", "STAINLESS STEEL BACK" Case Diameter: 35mm Lug-to-Lug: 42mm Thickness: 8mm Lug/Strap Width: 18mm

survivors.title: Vintage Timex Automatic Watch Silver Tone Dial Date Window RUNNING
survivors.description: Up for sale is a classic, vintage Timex Automatic mechanical watch. This time-tested piece features a self-winding mechanism, a silver-tone sunburst-style dial with distinct Arabic numeral hour markers, and a handy date window at the 3 o'clock position. It comes paired with an adjustable, vintage gold-tone/two-tone metal link bracelet. The watch is currently running and ticking, though its long-term timekeeping accuracy has not been rigorously tested over a 24-hour period. Item Specifics & Condition Please review the high-resolution photos provided (image.png, image_2.png, and image_3.png) to assess the exact cosmetic condition before purchasing. Movement: Automatic (Mechanical, Self-Winding) — Running/Ticking Dial: Silver-white dial with black Arabic numerals (12, 2, 4, 6, 8, 10) and stick indices. Features a date window at 3 o'clock. Case: Base metal bezel with a stainless steel back (as engraved on the case back seen in image_3.png). Shows signs of honest vintage wear, pocket scratches, and some minor plating wear/patina around the edges. Crystal: Acrylic crystal. It exhibits visible surface scratches and scuffs across the front (clearly visible in image.png and image_2.png), which is expected for a vintage watch of this age. These could potentially be buffed out with Polywatch or replaced if desired. Band: Vintage gold-tone metal link bracelet. Note that the underside of the band shows some typical wear and fading to the gold finish (visible in image_3.png). Water Resista

Crystal: Round crystal over the dial seated within the smooth bezel. Band: Brown leather strap with contrast stitching, matching leather keepers, and stainless steel tang buckle; strap underside stamped Keep Watching with 18 marking near the tip. Features: Mens analog quartz

survivors.description: Timex Men's Easy Reader 38mm Watch - Gold-Tone Case & Brown Leather (TW2U71500) Condition: 100% Brand New, unworn, in original retail box with papers. Please Note: The outer cardboard retail box may show minor cosmetic shelf wear or scuffs from storage/handling. The timepiece itself is in absolutely flawless, pristine condition. Bring a timeless sense of sophistication to your wrist with the iconic Timex Easy Reader. This classic timepiece features a polished 38mm gold-tone brass case, an exceptionally legible white dial with bold Arabic numeral markers, and a premium brown genuine leather strap. Designed for ultimate versatility, it effortlessly transitions from casual everyday wear to formal business settings. KEY FEATURES & SPECS: Legendary Readability: Distinctive clean white face featuring high-contrast black Arabic numerals and a full 12-hour analog display. Indiglo Night-Light: Timex's signature built-in backlight ensures you can read the time effortlessly even in pitch-black conditions. Classic Materials: Durable 38mm gold-finish case paired with a comfortable 20mm brown leather strap and a traditional secure buckle closure. Reliable Movement: Highly accurate Quartz analog battery movement with a protective, scratch-resistant mineral crystal window. Water Resistance: Rated to 30 meters (3 ATM / 100 feet), providing security against everyday splashes and rain. Ships out fast and safely packaged. Buy with absolute confidence!

survivors.title: Vintage Timex Disney Dick Tracey Womens Watch 32mm Red Leather 1990 New Battery
survivors.description: Vintage Timex Disney Dick Tracey Womens Watch 32mm Red Leather 1990 New Battery Brand: Timex; model line LA CELL with Disney character dial. Department: Women; casual analog wristwatch with round gold-tone case and red leather strap. Model: Vintage Timex LA Cell womens watch featuring a Disney Dick Tracy silhouette graphic dial. Movement: Quartz battery-powered movement with three-hand analog time display and central seconds hand. Case: Approximately 32 mm round gold-tone base metal bezel with smooth polished finish and straight lugs. Caseback: Stainless steel back engraved TIMEX LA CELL, WATER RESISTANT, BASE METAL BEZEL, STAINLESS STEEL BACK, and ASSEMBLED IN PHILIPPINES. Dial: Multicolor graphic dial with Dick Tracy silhouette artwork, red outer ring, red hour and minute hands, and white central seconds hand. Crystal: Flat clear crystal set within the gold-tone bezel to protect the dial. Band: Textured red genuine leather two-piece strap with matching red keepers, black underside, and gold-tone buckle closure. Features: 12-hour analog display, central seconds hand, water-resistant construction, base metal bezel with stainless steel back, and buckle-closure leather strap. Actual Measurements: Case diameter across the bezel excluding crown approximately 32.4 mm as shown on the digital caliper display. Identifiers: Dial printed TIMEX on the hands and Disney; caseback engraved TIMEX LA CELL, WATER RESISTANT, BASE METAL BEZEL, STAINLESS STEEL BACK, and ASSEMBLED IN PHILIPPINES;

survivors.title: Vintage Timex Quartz Men's TV Dial Cushion Case Date Watch Expansion
survivors.description: VINTAGE TIMEX QUARTZ MEN'S WATCH Classic 1980s–1990s Timex featuring the iconic cushion-shaped "TV dial" case. ⌚ DIAL: Silver-tone face, bold black Arabic numerals, minute track, "TIMEX" at 12 o'clock, "QUARTZ" at 6 o'clock, date window at 3 o'clock. CASEBACK: Stainless steel back, base metal bezel. Timex "LA Cell" (Lift & Access). MOVEMENT: Timex quartz, assembled in Thailand. Currently has an old Eveready 395 battery — needs a fresh battery (SR927SW, under $2 at any drugstore). Movement appears intact. BAND: Original silver-tone stainless steel expansion (stretch) bracelet. All links intact, stretches properly. Normal surface scratches consistent with age. SIZE: Cushion/rounded square case, approx. 34–36mm. Confirmed with ruler in photos. CONDITION: Used — Fair/Good vintage condition. - Crystal has significant surface scratches - Dial shows light age spotting and dust - Crown present and intact, some grime around case edges - Band structurally solid with normal wear scratches - Needs a new 395/SR927SW battery to run - Not tested — sold as-is
